title: Gilead Sciences Investor Relations
note: Primary investor-relations portal for company financial releases and reports.

title: Gilead Sciences 2024 Form 10-K
note: Annual-report source for product sales context, business risks, HIV franchise strength, oncology products, and competitive/regulatory disclosures.

title: Gilead Medicines
note: Company product list used to verify Biktarvy and Trodelvy as Gilead medicines.

title: Gilead Sciences Market Cap
note: Market-cap reference supplied in the queued manifest.

title: Gilead Sciences Stock Price and Financial Metrics
note: Market-data source for approximate market capitalization, P/E ratio, revenue, and company financial snapshot near the review date.

title: FDA Frequently Asked Questions on Patents and Exclusivity
note: Regulatory context explaining Orange Book patent and exclusivity listings for approved drugs.

title: FDA Approves Sacituzumab Govitecan-hziy for HR-positive Breast Cancer
note: FDA approval context for Trodelvy in a breast-cancer indication.

title: Sacituzumab Govitecan-hziy
note: Clinical reference describing Trodelvy as a targeted therapy antibody-drug conjugate and summarizing cancer-treatment context.

title: Open Targets Platform
note: Open-source target-disease evidence platform used as an upstream discovery alternative and enabler for decentralized research concepts.

title: OpenFreeEnergy
note: Open-source computational drug-discovery ecosystem for binding free-energy calculations.

title: OpenFold Consortium
note: Open-source biology software effort relevant to protein modeling and open drug-discovery infrastructure.
